name: Snoop Dogg
abstract: Calvin Cordozar Broadus Jr. (born October 20, 1971), known professionally as Snoop Dogg, is an American rapper, singer, record producer, songwriter, and actor.

about_quotes.speaker: David Finck
about_quotes.evidence: of the rap artists I like Snoop Dog. I think he’s got a groove, he swings, he’s humorous.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Finck interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 29, 2015

about_quotes.speaker: Robert Glasper
about_quotes.evidence: He used to call me up to do Snoop Dogg tours and stuff, because he was Snoop Dog’s music director too. I was never around to do them.
about_quotes.doc_title: Robert Glasper interviewed by Greg Thomas, Clinton, New York, February 20, 2016

about_quotes.speaker: Robert Glasper
about_quotes.evidence: He used to call me up to do Snoop Dogg tours and stuff, because he was Snoop Dog’s music director too. I was never around to do them.
about_quotes.doc_title: Robert Glasper interviewed by Greg Thomas, Clinton, New York, February 20, 2016

about_quotes.speaker: Catherine Russell
about_quotes.evidence: Many of us have done a lot of TV work behind many people, Paul Simon, Youssou N’Dour, Snoop Dogg, you know, Al Green...
about_quotes.doc_title: Catherine Russell interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, October 26, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: Gap Mangione
about_quotes.evidence: Chuck has been sampled by a lot of very famous rappers, used by Snoop Dogg and that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Gap Mangione interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rochester, New York, January 11, 2012
